summary: A brief announcement of the Steve Jobs Archive's publication 'Letters to a Young Creator'. The article highlights Jobs's lifelong habit of seeking advice from diverse experts and his belief in the obligation to contribute to the human experience.

principles.statement: Seek out knowledge and fresh perspectives from diverse voices.
principles.rationale: Surrounding yourself with people from various disciplines—artists, scientists, designers, and humanitarians—fuels a life of creativity and curiosity.

principles.statement: We have an obligation to give something back to the human experience.
principles.rationale: Because our own existence is directly enriched by the work and knowledge of others, we must strive to make something wonderful and put it out into the world.
